MOTION FOR ORDER DECLARING LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DULY WOUND UP AND DISSOLVED AND AUTHORIZING DISTRIBUTION TO CREDITORS ON TIMELY FILED CLAIMS FILED BY PETITIONER GREEN, DAWN MEMBER OF CAPER LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY IN PROCESS OF WINDING UP DE LA PLATA, MARQUEZ MEMBER OF CAPER LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY IN PROCESS OF WINDING UP HEARING SET FOR MAY-18-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
ORDER ASSUMING JURISDICTION OVER WIND-UP AND DISSOLUTION PROCEEDINGS

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS DAWN GREEN AND MARQUEZ DE LA PLATA'S MOTION FOR ORDER DECLARING LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DULY WOUND UP AND DISSOLVED AND AUTHORIZING DISTRIBUTION TO CREDITORS ON TIMELY FILED CLAIMS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

calendar.matters:
MOTION For Order Declaring Limited Liability Company Duly Wound Up And Dissolved And Authorizing Distribution To Creditors On Timely Filed Claims
Off Calendar May-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kaipo K.B. Young, Esq., of Bartlett, Leader-Picone & Young, LLP, (510) 444-2404, for Petitioners and Moving Parties
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS DAWN GREEN AND MARQUEZ DE LA PLATA'S MOTION For Order Declaring Limited Liability Company Duly Wound Up And Dissolved And Authorizing Distribution To Creditors On Timely Filed Claims is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (301/JLW/ds) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

Order To Show Cause Why The Court Should Not Assume Jurisdiction Over The Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-30-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kaipo Young, Esq. of Bartlett & Leader-Picone, 510-444-2404 for petitioner and moving party Dawn Green Member of Caper LLC

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS --
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THE COURT SHOULD NOT ASSUME JURISDICTION OVER PROCEEDINGS. REQUEST FOR THE COURT TO ASSUME JURISDICTION IS GRANTED GIVEN THE ABSENCE OF OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE:PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558. (301/BUSCH)
